description_long: This cowshed is a rustic agricultural building with a stone-textured exterior and a green, shingled gable roof. The structure features a main barn area and an attached lean-to section, both enclosed by a simple wooden fence. Several barrels and crates are placed around the perimeter, suggesting storage or utility use. The front side has a row of open stalls or bays, likely for livestock, and a single wooden door is visible on one end. The overall appearance is weathered and utilitarian, with minimal decorative elements. The building is designed for practical use, providing shelter and organization for farm animals and equipment.
description: A rustic stone cowshed with a green gable roof, open stalls, and a wooden fence, featuring barrels and crates for storage.
description_view_0: Side view showing the gable roof, attached lean-to, and fenced area with barrels and crates.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the stone wall, green roof, and a single wooden door with no visible windows.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the full length of the roof, fence, and storage containers.
description_view_3: Front view revealing open stalls or bays, the main entrance area, and the fenced enclosure.
